descriptions.text:
Enhansa Edition is a romhack for Chrono Trigger, one that aims to improve the original's game combat system to make battles more engaging and to make many techs more useful. Enemy AI, equipment, items, and techs have been modified. The old tab system is replaced with a more flexible new one accessed through the End of Time.

While challenging, the aim of this romhack was not to be a hardtype mod, and it's difficulty is comparable to the original.
